events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes voltage glove class wrong or overdue. This is a PPE selection issue in Safety & Rigging scope. The gloves are wrong class or overdue for testing. This is non-compliant and potentially dangerous.

Decision: fail
Risk: high or critical - wrong voltage glove class can lead to electrocution/arc flash injury. Critical seems appropriate.
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 70
Value: 0
Confidence: 0.9
Findings: voltage glove class incorrect or testing overdue
Actions: remove from service, replace with correct class gloves current on testing
References: NFPA 70E, OSHA 1910 Subpart I
